owner_operator_stated: Record entity is 'Dr Ashwini S Joshi Inc,' but the current site at this exact address (5470 W. Madison St., Chicago, IL 60644) identifies as Madison Pine Dental Clinic, founded and led by Dr. James Poulos (Senior Partner) with Dr. David Kim (Partner) and other independent-contractor/associate dentists (Dzakovich, Nemec, Nick Poulos, Hao). Dr. Ashwini Joshi is not named anywhere on the site.
notes: Address matches the record exactly, but the operating entity/brand and named doctors have no relation to 'Dr Ashwini S Joshi Inc' -- classic successor/rebrand pattern (site's listed phone (773) 287-2277 also differs from the record's (773) 287-3939, consistent with a later ownership change reassigning the line). No careers page found on the current site.

All Star Dental's Austin location page matches the record's address (5644 W Roosevelt Rd, Chicago, IL 60644) and phone ((773) 473-8888) exactly. All Star Dental is a multi-location group (~5 Chicago-area offices) and does not name individual doctors on the location page (record name 'Oanh Le' not confirmed). The single current opening on the shared careers page (Dental Assistant) is posted for a different office (United Center, 2316 W Madison St), not confirmed specifically for this location.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Larisa Spirtovic and Dr. Chester Klos co-founded Kiss Dental PC in 2010 and established the office at 2925 Touhy; they remain co-owners, matching the record entity 'Kiss Dental'.
notes: Phone number (773) 465-2600 matches the record exactly, corroborating this as the correct practice/entity. However, the site's current official address is 3500 Dempster St, Skokie, IL 60076 -- the record's 2925 W Touhy Ave, Chicago address is not listed as an active office on the official site (only in older third-party directory listings), suggesting the practice may have relocated within the area while retaining its phone number. No careers page found (/careers/ returns 404).

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Irene Gula founded the practice (branded 'City Edge Dental') in 1993 and is the lead dentist, matching the record entity 'IRENE GULA DDS, PC'.
notes: Address (6304 N Nagle Ave, Chicago, IL 60646) and phone ((773) 631-6802) match the record exactly; 'City Edge Dental' is Dr. Irene Gula's practice brand. A 'Join our team' application page exists (/apply/) but lists no specific current openings/titles -- just a generic always-hiring form -- so no structured openings could be extracted.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Alin Alkass is the owner/dentist of Smiles on Elston, matching the record entity 'ALIN ALKASS, DDS, PC' exactly.
notes: Address (5780 N Elston Ave, Chicago, IL 60646) and phone ((773) 763-7434) both match the record exactly. Single-provider independent practice; no careers/hiring page found.

Vendor hint domain dentistsareus.com is a live but blank 'Under Construction' placeholder with no business content -- it does not display this record's address (2957 W Armitage Ave) or phone ((773) 772-0077), so it cannot be corroborated as this practice's site. No other official website was found via search; only third-party directory profiles (Yelp, Healthgrades, WebMD, Sharecare, Yellowpages) reference 'Govind B Patel DDS and Associates' at this address/phone, none pointing to an owned domain.
